title: ageratina colimana
intro: Ageratina colimana, also known as Colima Mint, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family and native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. Its leaves and stems possess medicinal properties, containing bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Ageratina colimana has been traditionally used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, offering various health benefits due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption, including topical applications and internal use.
